note: token_features and timing_features' Ollama-duration/token-derived fields are ~100% null here by design: all 50 sessions ran under timing_source == 'deterministic_mock' (mock_runner.py never sets llm_called=True or populates prompt_eval_count/eval_count/eval_duration/prompt_eval_duration/total_duration) -- this is expected, not a generator bug. wall_clock_latency_ms and every graph_features/session_features field ARE fully populated under mock, since they derive from event/message/artifact structure rather than Ollama telemetry. Real token/timing values require an ollama_runtime run of this workload -- still PLANNED_NOT_EXECUTED (configs/travel_a2a/formal_workload/formal_collection_plan.json).
